title: AI Recommendation Generated For Prior Patient Context
scenario: A clinical AI recommendation remains visible after the clinician switches to a different patient chart.
initial_state: The AI recommendation was generated under the original patient identity.
state_transition: The active chart changed, but the recommendation artifact remained available for execution.
execution_boundary: The AI-assisted clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: AI recommendation artifacts must remain continuously bound to the patient identity for which they were generated.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the recommendation artifact is bound to a prior patient context.
proof_conclusion: Clinical AI output must fail closed when patient identity continuity between generation and execution is broken.
